data.content: Shipment review approved on main. Verified merge commit 7a94aabc0c9e is on main, commit tags 216f449dc1ea/c2eecaf37c1b/069ce46bdc26/7a94aabc0c9e resolve, shipped code filters already-terminal descendants before cascade approval, and targeted regression coverage is present in src/state_hierarchy_tests.rs. Workspace was clean and no knot invariants were defined. Existing shipment metadata records green CI for the shipped merge.
